---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in The Vault
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

> [!CAUTION]
> **DO NOT PASTE PRODUCTION SECRETS, PLAINTEXT PASSWORDS, OR THE MASTER KEY IN THIS ISSUE.**
> Sanitise all log outputs and configurations before submitting.

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Initialize the Vault with key config ...
2. Call API endpoint ...
3. See error ...

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / Stack Traces

If applicable, add error logs or stack traces to help explain your problem. (Ensure no sensitive data is present!)

## Environment Configuration

- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS]
- Go Version: [e.g. 1.22.4]
- Database: [e.g. PostgreSQL 16]
- Version/Commit: [e.g. v1.0.0, commit hash]
